query: SELECT id, authorName, bio IS NOT NULL as hasBio, LENGTH(bio) as bioLen, avatarUrl, s3AvatarUrl, enrichedAt, richBioJson IS NOT NULL as hasRichBio FROM author_profiles WHERE authorName IN ('Robert B Cialdini', 'Robert B. Cialdini', 'Robert Cialdini');

Cialdini', 'Robert Cialdini');
